title: mirabilis jalapa var. planiflora
intro: Mirabilis jalapa var. planiflora, also known as the four o'clock flower, is a variety of the Mirabilis jalapa plant that exhibits flat or rosette-shaped flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mirabilis jalapa var. planiflora include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
